metadata.lyrics:
[00:23.45] Last night I was dreaming
[00:26.84] I was locked in a prison cell
[00:30.70] When I woke up I was screaming
[00:35.26] Calling out your name (whoa)
[00:39.97] And the judge and the jury
[00:42.81] They all put the blame on me (the blame on me)
[00:47.88] They wanna tell from my story
[00:51.65] They want to hear my plea
[00:55.61] Only you can set me free
[00:59.03] 'Cause I'm guilty (Guilty)
[01:01.51] Guilty as a girl can be
[01:03.77] Come on baby can't you see
[01:06.79] I stand accused
[01:09.69] Of love in the first degree
[01:15.79] (Guilty) Of love in the first degree
[01:19.92] Someday I'm believing
[01:23.23] You will come to my rescue
[01:27.28] Unchain my heart, you'll keep him
[01:31.85] Let me start a new (uuuu)
[01:36.44] The hours passed so slowly
[01:39.40] Since they've thrown away the key (Away the key)
[01:44.49] Can't you see that I'm lonely
[01:48.32] Won't you help me plea
[01:52.18] Only you can set me free
[01:55.65] 'Cause I'm guilty (Guilty)
[01:57.92] Guilty as a girl can be
[02:00.21] Come on baby can't you see
[02:03.22] I stand accused
[02:06.29] Of love in the first degree
[02:12.27] (Guilty) Of Love in the first degree
[02:16.95] (Guilty)
[02:18.24] Of Love
[02:18.71] (Guilty)
[02:22.35] Of Love in
[02:24.30] (Guilty) of Love
[02:26.78] (Guilty) of Love in
[02:28.46] (Guilty)
[02:29.48] Of love in the first degree
[02:33.14] And the judge and the jury
[02:35.88] They all put the blame on me
[02:40.92] They wanna tell from my story
[02:44.55] They wanna hear my plea
[02:48.66] Only you can set me free
[02:51.91] 'Cause I'm guilty (Guilty)
[02:54.45] As a girl can be
[02:56.65] Come on baby can't you see
[02:59.63] I stand accused
[03:02.78] Of Love in the first degree
